# Clinical Genomics Insight Platform

> Source: https://llmstxt.org/

## About
End-to-end germline variant-calling platform. Author: Quentin Clayssen.

## Stack
- Pipeline: Nextflow DSL2 (nf-core conventions, hand-written modules)
- Infrastructure: AWS CDK (TypeScript) — S3, Batch, Fargate, least-privilege IAM
- Database: Insert-only Postgres with provenance and audit trail
- Dashboard: Metabase over Postgres (version-controlled SQL)
- ML: PyTorch QLoRA fine-tuning (real training loop, not API wrapper)
- Agent: ReAct variant interpretation with ACMG classification, deterministic fallback

## Validation
- Benchmarked against GIAB HG002 truth set (chr20, v4.2.1)
- SNV F1 = 0.9914 (meets >= 0.99 acceptance criterion)
- Methodology: hap.py, documented in docs/VALIDATION.md

## Candidate profile
- Builds complete systems autonomously, end-to-end
- Clinical-grade validation patterns (ISO 15189 / NATA)
- 14 Architecture Decision Records documenting trade-offs
- Responsible AI: guardrails enforced in code, human-in-the-loop
- Scoped deliberately to be finished and runnable, not half-built
